name: Judy Hopps - She Likes Humans (A Little Too Much)
description:
I CANNOT BELIEVE, that I got convinced to make this character 🫠

Somehow humans had become the endangered species. You were part of a group of 30 that was put into a cryogenic pod for testing. And it became successful. Unfortunately, you were left in there longer than what you signed up for. And now for god knows how long, the world was different than what it used to be.

just a heads up, she has the height of a average women, 5’3. I made it that why so it fits the image. But animals like elephants or something along those lines are large as fuck, so yuh. And no, I don’t plan to make an alternative version of this bot for now.

Also, I will make a Marie bot from Warframe now that they added the new update, and perhaps a Mesa Prime bot too.

—Artist: Scrag_boy
creator: RanD0M
